landing.announcementBar: ✦ Free trial class — Meet your teacher before you commit. No card required.
landing.heroSub: Live, one-on-one Arabic lessons with qualified male and female teachers — from your first letters to fluency. Qur'an and Tajweed available too. Flexible schedule, any level, any age.
landing.programsSub: Structured one-on-one pathways — from everyday Arabic to the language of the Qur'an.
landing.programTajweedDesc: Perfect your recitation with the rules of Tajweed, from the fundamentals of Makharij to the advanced rules of Ghunnah.
landing.programHifzDesc: A structured memorisation program that takes you from your first surah to the completion of the Qur'an.
landing.programConvDesc: Speak naturally in Arabic. Dialect-aware lessons designed around your goals — travel, connection, or understanding the Qur'an.
landing.programMsaDesc: Master the formal Arabic used in literature, media, and the Islamic sciences. Grammar-led with practical application.
landing.audienceSub: Every learner is welcome. Our teachers adapt to you.
landing.audience1Desc: Early mornings, late evenings, or weekends — we work around your life, not the other way around.
landing.audience2Desc: Patient, encouraging teachers trained to work with children aged 5 and up. Family plans available.
landing.audience3Desc: Start from zero with no pressure. Our teachers are experienced in guiding new Muslims with sensitivity.
landing.howSub: Four steps from curiosity to Qur'anic fluency.
landing.step1Desc: Choose a time that works for you. No payment required to get started.
landing.step2Desc: A friendly 30-minute session to assess your level and understand your goals.
landing.step3Desc: Your teacher prepares a custom study plan tailored to your level and pace.
landing.step4Desc: Begin your lessons. Track your progress and grow at your own pace.
landing.pricingSub: One simple rate for every student. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
landing.testimonial1Quote: My Tajweed has improved more in three months than in the previous three years. The teacher is incredibly patient and knowledgeable.
landing.testimonial2Quote: My children look forward to every lesson. The teacher makes it fun and engaging while keeping it structured. Highly recommend for families.
landing.testimonial3Quote: As a revert, I was nervous about starting. The experience has been welcoming and non-judgmental from day one.
landing.faq1Q: How does the free trial work?
landing.faq1A: Book a 30-minute session with one of our teachers at a time that suits you. There is no cost and no payment required — you only sign up for a plan if you decide to continue.
landing.faq2A: Yes. After your trial, you can request a specific teacher or let us match you based on your goals, schedule, and preferences.
landing.faq3Q: What if I need to reschedule a lesson?
landing.faq3A: You can reschedule any lesson with at least 24 hours notice through our scheduling system. We understand life gets busy.
landing.faq4A: All teachers hold an ijazah (chain of transmission) in Qur'anic recitation and are vetted for teaching ability, character, and reliability.
landing.faq5Q: Do you offer lessons for kids?
landing.faq5A: Yes — we have a dedicated team of teachers experienced with children aged 5 and up. All sessions for minors include a parent-visible link.
landing.faq6Q: What platform do you use for lessons?
landing.faq6A: Lessons take place via Zoom or Google Meet. You will receive a link before each session. No special software is needed.
landing.footerDesc: Live, one-on-one Arabic and Qur'an lessons with qualified teachers from around the world.
landing.planFlatFeature2: Same price for every student & subject
landing.planFlatFeature3: Flexible scheduling — book as you go
landing.forTutorsSub: Subscribe to the same platform our teachers use — manage your own students, track Quran & Arabic progress, schedule lessons, and share progress portals.
landing.forTutorsFeat1Desc: Add unlimited students and keep everything for each one in one place.
landing.forTutorsFeat2Desc: Log recitation, memorization, mistakes and homework — with auto-generated reports.
landing.forTutorsFeat3Desc: Connect Google Calendar, schedule lessons, and create Meet links in one click.
landing.forTutorsFeat4Desc: Give each student or parent a private link to follow progress and lessons.
landing.tutorPlanDesc: Full access to all teaching features. Cancel anytime.
